india_trends.title: US Stock Market: Wall Street indexes hit record highs as oil falls with Strait of Hormuz declared open
india_trends.summary: Major US stock indices, including the S&P 500 and Nasdaq, closed at record highs Friday, fueled by optimism over Iran's decision to open the Strait of Hormuz and potential peace talks with the US. india_trends.summary: Indian stock markets rallied for a second week, driven by hopes of peace in West Asia and a strengthening rupee. india_trends.title: Jio Financial Q4 net profit falls 14% as expenses spike to Rs 692 crore
india_trends.summary: Jio Financial Services saw a nearly 14% drop in March quarter net profit to ₹272 crore, despite a significant rise in total income. india_trends.title: Even a Rs 15,000-crore buyback fails to cheer Wipro investors
india_trends.summary: Wipro's stock fell on Friday after its March-quarter earnings missed expectations, with a ₹15,000 crore buyback failing to boost sentiment. The IT major reported a 2% decline in consolidated net profit, and brokerages expressed caution due to weaker-than-expected performance and revenue headwinds. A

india_trends.title: Nifty 'maturity' sets stage for a bull market: ICICI Direct
india_trends.summary: The Nifty has reached a significant point of maturity. This suggests a strong bottom is in place. Analysts believe this sets the stage for the next phase of a bull market. The Nifty target has been revised upwards. Historically, major corrections have bottomed out and led to substantial rallies.

india_trends.title: LNG ships move toward Hormuz after Iran says Strait is open
india_trends.summary: Liquefied natural gas tankers are approaching the Strait of Hormuz, potentially resuming vital fuel flows after Iran declared the strait open. india_trends.title: Irdai keeps FY27 cession rate at 4%, backs GIC Re role
india_trends.summary: Irdai has maintained the mandatory 4% cession rate for FY27, directing general insurers to place this share with GIC Re. india_trends.summary: The Securities and Exchange Board of India has approved IPOs for four companies, including Avaada Electro, Brookfield-backed Avaada Group's solar PV manufacturing arm. india_trends.title: US extends waiver allowing India and other countries to buy Russian oil
india_trends.summary: The Donald Trump administration has issued a short-term waiver allowing countries to continue buying sanctioned Russian oil loaded on ships until May 16, aiming to stabilise global energy prices amid the US-Israeli war on Iran.

india_trends.title: Adani bags top spot in richest Asians’ club
india_trends.summary: Gautam Adani has officially claimed the title of Asia's wealthiest individual, overtaking Mukesh Ambani with a net worth of $92.6 billion as of April 16. The surge in Adani Group stock prices has fueled this remarkable comeback after earlier hardships. Adani now proudly ranks 19th on the prestigious

india_trends.title: Starlink unable to get signal for India liftoff; faces FDI hurdles amid security concerns
india_trends.summary: Starlink's plan for satellite services in India is stalled. The government is reviewing Elon Musk's company's investment proposal carefully. india_trends.title: US Treasuries Rally as Falling Oil Boosts Interest Rate-Cut Bets
india_trends.summary: Treasuries gained to wrap up a choppy week of war-driven swings, as easing tensions in the Middle East drove oil lower and prompted traders to boost wagers that the Federal Reserve will cut interest rates this year.

india_trends.title: US stocks today: S&P 500, Nasdaq end at fresh records as oil prices tumble
india_trends.summary: Major Wall Street indices rocketed to fresh records Friday after Iran's announcement reopening the Strait of Hormuz sent oil prices sharply lower.
